MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-19-2021 - JONATHAN VAKNIN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. ARASH MOUSSAVIAN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. PARTIES STIPULATED TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND REQUESTED A 90 DAY CONTINUANCE. THE COURT GRANTED PARTIES ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE PER STIPULATION WITH A CONTINUANCE FEE OF $60 TO BE PAID VIA E-FILING. PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT THE TOTAL $60 FEE AND DEFENDANT TO REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF $30. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO APR-12-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K.
